node_6.subject: Klaus Mueller
node_6.description: This is Klaus Mueller's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, head to the library at 8:30 am, spend the morning conducting research for his paper on gentrification from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm, have lunch at Hobbs Cafe from 12:00 pm to 1:00 pm, return to the library to continue writing from 1:30 pm to 4:30 pm, take a break and reflect on his progress from 4:30 pm to 5:00 pm, eat dinner at 5:00 pm, unwind by reading a book or watching a show from 6:00 pm to 7:30 pm.
